overall.description: Gameplay footage from a third-person perspective showing a character riding a large mechanical bird mount over a turbulent ocean. The character flies past a rocky island and tropical beach before navigating through a field of ancient wooden shipwrecks near ruined coastal towers.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous flight over a turbulent ocean that transitions from an open seascape into a dense graveyard of ancient ruins. It begins with the camera trailing a character on a mechanical bird mount gliding low over choppy waters toward distant stone towers under a partly cloudy sky. As the mount advances, the scenery shifts to a small rocky island marked by a red object before sweeping over a tropical beach filled with palm trees and red vegetation. The flight then returns to the open sea, where the environment opens into a field of ancient wooden shipwrecks. Finally, the camera weaves between broken masts and decaying hulls while closing in on massive ruined towers looming in the distance.
